name: Fintoc
description: Chilean open banking API enabling account data access and payment initiation for fintechs in Chile and Mexico.

seo.title: Fintoc — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Fintoc: Chilean open banking API enabling account data access and payment initiation for fintechs in Chile and Mexico.

when_to_use: Bank account data aggregation for Chilean fintech apps
Payment initiation from bank accounts in Chile and Mexico
Income verification via bank transaction history
Open banking connectivity for LATAM consumer financial apps
Account-to-account payment rails for e-commerce checkout

pros: Deep Chilean bank coverage unmatched locally
Also covers Mexico with growing scope
Developer docs clearer than many regional APIs
cons: Geography limited to Chile and Mexico
Competition from Belvo for LatAm leadership
Connector stability varies by Chilean bank
review.verdict: Strong niche option for Chile-first fintechs; Belvo has broader LatAm reach overall.
review.best_for: Chile and Mexico fintechs needing account data and payment initiation
review.not_for: Fintechs expanding across multiple LatAm markets needing one vendor

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metering; scales with consumption, no explicit peak-lock.
